originalTitle: Suspected suicide attacks kill at least 23 in north-east Nigeria
title: Suspected suicide attacks kill at least 23 in north-east Nigeria
content: Multiple blasts struck some of the Maiduguri's busiest locations on Monday evening.

originalTitle: 'Fire came from the sky and burned them' - life on the brink of civil war in South Sudan
title: 'Fire came from the sky and burned them' - life on the brink of civil war in South Sudan
content: Some 50,000 people are told to flee their homes as the army warns of a huge military offensive in Jonglei state.

originalTitle: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
title: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
content: Some 1,000 Kenyans are believed to have recruited to fight in Ukraine - many say they were lured under false pretences.

originalTitle: ‘How do I survive?’ Drought plagues Kenya’s Turkana amid surplus elsewhere
title: ‘How do I survive?’ Drought plagues Kenya’s Turkana amid surplus elsewhere
content: As a quarter of Kenya’s population faces severe food shortages, up to 40% of food produced is lost or wasted each year.

originalTitle: Building burns in Israel after rocket attack from Lebanon
title: Building burns in Israel after rocket attack from Lebanon
content: A building in the northern Israeli city of Nahariyya caught fire on Monday after a rocket attack launched from Lebanon.

originalTitle: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
content: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

originalTitle: Trump seeks to delay meeting with Xi in China
title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with Xi in China
content: The escalating war in Iran has overshadowed many of the US' foreign policy objectives

originalTitle: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
title: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
content: The National Center for Learning Disabilities said it was "disturbed" by the president's remarks.

originalTitle: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
title: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
content: Some of the bodies were injured beyond recognition, forensic laboratory sources told the BBC.

originalTitle: Wales leave captain Ramsey out of World Cup play-off squad
title: Wales leave captain Ramsey out of World Cup play-off squad
content: Captain Aaron Ramsey is left out of the Wales squad for this month's World Cup play-offs, casting further doubt over his future.

originalTitle: Arsenal trial and self-doubt: Valverde's journey to Real legend
title: Arsenal trial and self-doubt: Valverde's journey to Real legend
content: Rejected by Arsenal as a teenager, Federico Valverde has transformed himself into a Real Madrid legend - and was the main man in their Champions League win over Manchester City last week.

originalTitle: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
content: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
